message:
test(cve-arena): re-run bd-15n.2 fixtures after ABI nativization

Re-execute the bd-15n.2 CVE arena fixture suite against the updated ABI
layer. All three strict fixtures (ctype, math, socket) now exit with
code 124 (timeout) instead of 139 (SIGSEGV), indicating that the
nativized DNS resolver and corrected stdio pointer types have eliminated
the segfault. The fixtures still fail (timeout instead of expected
exit 0), which is tracked separately.

Updated artifacts:
- exit_code files: 139 -> 124 for all three strict fixtures
- report.json: refreshed timestamps and timing data
- artifact_index.json: updated SHA256 checksums for report + trace
- trace.jsonl: refreshed trace entries with new timestamps and errno=124

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
   "index_version": 1,
   "run_id": "bd15n2-fixture-v1",
   "bead_id": "bd-15n.2",
-  "generated_utc": "2026-02-27T05:36:51.297Z",
+  "generated_utc": "2026-02-27T05:41:09.861Z",
   "artifacts": [
     {
       "path": "tests/cve_arena/results/bd-15n.2/bin/fixture_ctype",
@@ -91,7 +91,7 @@
